modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't connect to secure websites on Mac OS.

full_description_text: So, the user was trying to get to usd.edu and other secure sites. They just can't seem to access them at all. It's happening on Safari, Firefox, and Chrome. Really frustrating, right?
short_description: Can't connect to secure websites on Mac OS.
description: So, the user was trying to get to usd.edu and other secure sites. They just can't seem to access them at all. It's happening on Safari, Firefox, and Chrome. Really frustrating, right?
